rows.JPja: ゴロゴロ～ゴロゴロ～
rows.USen: Zzz...
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:16 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103]>Welcome to the Great Deku Tree's Navel!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]>在这里可以一边呼吸森林的清新空气，
一边幸福地睡上一觉哦！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]>你可以在這裡呼吸森林的新鮮空氣
並幸福地入睡喔！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]>ここでなら きれいな<Ruby={2:4}もり>森の<Ruby={4:6}くうき>空気を<Ruby={2:2}す>吸いながら
<Ruby={2:6}しあわ>幸せに ねむれまスよ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]>You can sleep serenely here, drinking in
the sweet forest air!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><Ruby={2:2}す>好きなだけ むにゃむにゃゴロゴロ
していってくださイね！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]>Take as long as you like with your yawns
and your Zs!

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:2}と>泊まる
rows.USen: I'd like to sleep.

rows.JPja: おいくら？
rows.USen: How much?

rows.JPja: やめる
rows.USen: Gotta go.

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}あさ>朝まで
rows.USen: Until morning.

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}ひる>昼まで
rows.USen: Until noon.

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}よる>夜まで
rows.USen: Until evening.

rows.JPja: やっぱりやめる
rows.USen: Never mind.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>おはようの <Ruby={2:4}あさ>朝まででスね！<unk[5:0]>
ハイ むにゃむにゃ～ <unk[5:0]>ゴロゴロ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>Until I say "good morning"? Sounds good.
Sleep well!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>おはようございまス！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}あさ>朝ゴハンは お<Ruby={2:6}となり>隣のきのこ<Ruby={2:2}や>屋さんでどうぞでス～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>Good morning! You can grab some
breakfast next door at the Spore Store!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>こんちわの <Ruby={2:4}ひる>昼まででスね！<unk[5:0]>
ハイ むにゃむにゃ～ <unk[5:0]>ゴロゴロ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>Until I say "good afternoon"? Sounds
good. Sleep well!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>你好！
培帕帕一直在一旁守护勇者大人香甜的睡姿哦！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>こんちわでス！<unk[5:0]> ゆうしゃサマが
スヤスヤ<Ruby={2:2}ね>寝てるの <Ruby={4:6}みまも>見守ってましタ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>Good afternoon! I stood watch while you
were asleep, Mr. Hero!

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>こんばんわの <Ruby={2:4}よる>夜まででスね！<unk[5:0]>
ハイ むにゃむにゃ～ <unk[5:0]>ゴロゴロ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>Until I say "good evening"? Sounds good.
Sleep well!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>晚上好！
虽然培帕帕有点困，但还是准时叫醒勇者大人了！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>晚安你好！
雖然我有點睏了，不過還是有好好叫醒你的！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>こんばんわでス！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}すこ>少し<Ruby={2:4}ねむ>眠たいでスが ちゃんと<Ruby={2:2}お>起こせましタ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>Good evening! I'm a bit sleepy, but I made
sure I was able to wake you up!

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:256]>また むにゃむにゃゴロゴロしに<Ruby={2:2}き>来てくださイね
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:256]>Come back and catch some Zs soon, OK?

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>ア！<unk[5:0]> ルピーはいらないでスよ！<unk[5:0]>
ゆうしゃサマ なんでスから！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>Oh, I don't want your rupees! You're the
great Mr. Hero!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我不会收你卢比的……
偶尔要过来放松休息哦！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我不會收你盧比的……
偶爾還是過來放鬆休息吧！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>ルピーもいらないし…<unk[5:0]> たまには
むにゃむにゃゴロゴロしに<Ruby={2:2}き>来てくださイね！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Your rupees are no good here, so feel
free to stop by and snooze whenever
you'd like!
